title: claytonia calycina
intro: Claytonia calycina, also known as the mountain spring beauty or smallflower spring beauty, is a perennial plant species belonging to the portulacaceae family. It is used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Claytonia calycina include the potential to reduce inflammation and improve digestive health, making it a popular choice for those seeking natural remedies. Herbal preparations of Claytonia calycina can be found in the form of teas, tinctures, and salves, which can be used topically or internally to reap its medicinal benefits.
